# Forms Skill

## Auto-Load When

- building lead forms, contact forms, filters, uploads, or server action submissions

## Rules

- validate on the server even if client validation exists
- keep fields minimal and purposeful
- success and failure states must be explicit
- protect against spam and duplicate submission patterns

## Checklist

- labels and helper text present
- validation messages actionable
- submit disabled only when necessary
- loading state exists
- server-side validation implemented
- analytics or CRM mapping documented when relevant

## Best Practices

- keep optimistic UI bounded to safe cases
- preserve user input on recoverable errors
- use stable field names across client and server layers
